content_body: We came from hot and sunny Florida to enjoy the cold of the mountains and found this beautiful cabin. We have enjoyed every detail in the decoration and comfort of this cabin. Our kids really have been happy staying here from the bunk beds to the decor; it has been very fun. For us it was relaxing, peaceful, and a wonderful time to spend together as family without worries of the daily life. We hope we can do it again soon. P.S. We definitely will recommend this cabin to friends and family. :)
title: We Enjoyed Every Detail!
